'''√p-v-v''' ('''kapavav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ladderize|ladderize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-v-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ladderize|ladderize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √p-v-v
|-
! Lemma
| kapavav
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thipavav || jipavav || shipavav || kipavav
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthupavav || jujupavav || shushupavav || kukupavav
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thupavav || jupavav || shupavav || kupavav
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thupavav || jupavav || shupavav || kupavav
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thepavav || jepavav || shepavav || kepavav
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothopavav || jojopavav || shoshopavav || kokopavav
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thopavav || jopavav || shopavav || kopavav
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thopavav || jopavav || shopavav || kopavav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || pavav || pavav || pavav || pavav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || pavav || pavav || pavav || pavav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || pavav || pavav || pavav || pavav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || pavav || pavav || pavav || pavav
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæpavav || jæpavav || shæpavav || kæpavav
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathapavav || jajapavav || shashapavav || kakapavav
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thapavav || japavav || shapavav || kapavav
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thapavav || japavav || shapavav || kapavav
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shapavav
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshapavav
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishapavav
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shapavavnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshapavavnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishapavavnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shapavavshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshapavavnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishapavavshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shapavavro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshapavavnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishapavavro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shapavavmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshapavavnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishapavavmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shapavavsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshapavavnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishapavavsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shapavavng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshapavavnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishapavavng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shapavavya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshapavavnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishapavavya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shapavavyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshapavavnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishapavavyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shapavavnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshapavavnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishapavavnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shapavavnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshapavavnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishapavavnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shapavavnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshapavavnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishapavavnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shapavavshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshapavavnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishapavavshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shapavavshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshapavavnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishapavavshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shapavavshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshapavavnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishapavavshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shapavavronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshapavavnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishapavavronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shapavavroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshapavavnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishapavavroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shapavavromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshapavavnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishapavavromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shapavavmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshapavavnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishapavavmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shapavavmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshapavavnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishapavavmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shapavavmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshapavavnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishapavavmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
